description: Wearable items, jewelry, and ceremonial objects.
items: Amulet
A protective charm hanging from a chain around the neck.
Crown
A circlet of metal worn on the head as a mark of authority.
Cloak
A sweeping garment that drapes from the shoulders.
Ring
A band of metal worn on the finger, sometimes holding power.
Helm
A metal cap that guards the head in battle.
Gauntlet
An armored glove that protects and empowers the hand.
Armor
Layered plates of metal fitted to protect the body.
Boots
Sturdy footwear that carries the wearer through any terrain.
Circlet
A thin band of metal worn across the brow.
Brooch
An ornamental pin that clasps a cloak or collar.
Pendant
A decorative charm hanging from a chain.
Locket
A small case worn on a chain, holding something precious inside.
Diadem
A jeweled headpiece worn by royalty.
Talisman
A carved figure believed to bring luck or ward off evil.
Mantle
A ceremonial cloak that marks rank or power.
Mask
A covering for the face that hides identity or grants power.
Medallion
A large decorative disc worn on a chain.
Crest
An emblazoned symbol of family or faction.
Token
A small object given as a pledge or proof of identity.
Relic
An ancient object of religious or historical significance.
Banner
A cloth bearing a symbol, carried or displayed with pride.
